name: Maple Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour maple syrup into the top of a double boiler.
2. Butter each slice of bread and cube it.
3. Add the bread to the syrup mixture.
4. Add nuts or raisins and lemon juice.
5. In a separate bowl, beat together eggs, milk, salt, and vanilla.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the bread mixture.
7. Do not stir.
8. Set the dish over gently boiling water.
9. Cook for 1 hour. This will create its own sauce.
10. Spoon the sauce over each serving.
